reply:
[[BLOCK:slide22_shape1]]
Will set the regression coefficient to zero → selects variables by excluding some.  
Not suitable for wide data structures: If there are numerous predictors but limited observations (high p, low n), LASSO (Least Absolute Shrinkage and Selection Operator) will quickly saturate, halting further variable selection.  
When faced with a high degree of collinear predictors, LASSO selects only one and disregards the others.
